name: Honey Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 250°F.
In a large shallow roasting pan, combine popcorn and chow mein noodles.
Melt margarine and sugar in a small saucepan over low heat. Stir in vanilla and cinnamon until combined.
Pour the melted mixture evenly over popcorn and toss to coat.
Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 20 minutes to ensure even distribution of the coating.
Stir in honey roasted almonds just before removing from oven.
Spread mixture on paper towel to cool completely.
Store in an airtight container. Makes approximately 11 cups.
